name: pantheon
description: A deterministic agentic development framework for specification, planning, execution, audit, and verification workflows in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Structured agentic development workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Pantheon provides deterministic workflows for specification, planning, signing, execution, audit, checkpointing, resumption, and verification using specialized agent roles.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Pantheon to guide this development task through specification, planning, execution, audit, and verification.
